caribbean.headline: Caribbean Winds Rise
caribbean.paragraph: St. Thomas is experiencing 20 kt winds with 4.7 ft wave heights and an 81% rain probability, while Roatan is seeing winds of 26 kt. I expect these conditions to impact cruise ship operations, particularly in the Eastern Caribbean, where St. Thomas is a major port of call with less than 10% rain probability not being a factor in this region today.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Storm Hits Lisbon
mediterranean.paragraph: Lisbon is experiencing 100% rain probability with winds reaching 16 kt and wave heights of 7.3 ft, while Palma de Mallorca is seeing winds of 14 kt. I expect these conditions to impact port operations in the Western Mediterranean, particularly in Lisbon, where the high rain probability and moderate winds will require careful planning and preparation.
